purpose: Modal dialog for confirming actions, showing errors, asking yes/no questions. Has predefined types: Confirm, Error, Warning, Information, Success.
doRules: Use predefined types (Confirm / Error / Warning / Information / Success)
Include explicit buttons (Yes / No, Cancel / OK)
Match button intent to action consequence
dontRules: Do not use MessageBox for non-critical info — use MessageToast
Do not omit confirm button on destructive actions

layoutGuidance.placement: Place MessageBox inside a compatible container (Triggered from any context).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for feedback.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

patterns: Used inside Triggered from any context
exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
